title: Huawei VRP — OSPF with BFD integration

source.description: OSPF single-area with BFD on all OSPF-enabled interfaces, transit interfaces plus loopback

config.description: Single-area OSPF with BFD enabled on interfaces, loopback, and router-id. BFD timing aggressive for fast convergence

expected_translation.high_level: Cisco IOS equivalent with router ospf, ip ospf bfd interface config, and bfd template or interface bfd settings

verification.notes: manual review because capability gap — forbidden pattern 'bfd enable' fixed by narrowing to 'bfd enable\n' to avoid false-positive on 'BFD enabled' comment. LLM output contains valid Cisco IOS BFD syntax (bfd interval + bfd all-interfaces). BFD analyzer detects missing session peer-ip (warning). Keep deployable=false due to analyzer warning.
